# bitbucketdc_project (Data Source)

Reads an existing Bitbucket Data Center project by key.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) The project key to look up (e.g. MYPROJ).

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The project description.
- `id` (String) The project key (same as key).
- `name` (String) The display name of the project.
- `public` (Boolean) Whether the project is publicly accessible.
